data.title: ENDRA Life Sciences Initiates Review of Strategic Alternatives to Maximize Shareholder Value
data.description: ENDRA Life Sciences Inc. in Ann Arbor, Michigan (Nasdaq: NDRA) has started a strategic review to enhance shareholder value. The company, known for its thermoacoustic biomarker imaging for tracking steatotic liver disease (SLD), will assess various options. This includes considering strategic partnerships, investments, acquisitions, or a potential sale. The decision comes as the Board of Directors aims to maximize returns for stakeholders. ENDRA continues its mission to provide innovative solutions for the early detection and monitoring of SLD.

data.title: BODi Launches P90X Performance Supplements Featuring Advanced “P90X-Factor” Ingredients to Power Workouts, Recovery, and Everyday Performance
data.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif.--BODi (NASDAQ: BODI) unveiled a fresh range of cutting-edge P90X performance supplements, marking a significant expansion in the company’s nutrition line. These science-backed supplements aim to enhance performance, aid recovery, and promote overall wellness. The launch comes shortly after the successful introduction of the P90X Generation Next workout regimen. This new supplement series reinforces the P90X values, encompassing a holistic approach to training and well-being.

data.title: Reimagine Care Advances AI-Powered Cancer Care Support With a Major Evolution of Its Virtual Oncology Care Platform
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, Reimagine Care has introduced Remi, an AI-driven virtual oncology assistant designed to communicate effectively with cancer patients at all hours.

data.title: Inaba - The Company That Disrupted Cat Treats Is Now Coming for the Dogs with New Product
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, Inaba, a company known for disrupting the cat treats market, is now targeting dogs with their latest product launch. This move comes after the company's success in the cat treat industry, where they experienced a significant increase in revenue and market share. With the new product aimed at dogs, Inaba is looking to capitalize on the growing pet industry, which is currently valued at approximately $95.7 billion. The company's expansion into the dog treats market is a strategic move to further solidify its position as a key player in the pet food industry.

Poll: ECB to hold deposit rate at 2.00% through 2026, say 38 of 60 economists (versus 67 of 72 in March 13th poll). ECB to hike deposit rate at least once in 2026, say 21 of 60 economists (versus 3 of 72 in March)

data.title: Roots Announces Second Year of Partnership with Canadian Basketball Star Toby Fournier, Furthering Commitment to Women in Sport
data.description: Toronto-based Roots Corporation, a global outdoor lifestyle brand traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol ROOT, has revealed the extension of its collaboration with Toby Fournier, a standout Canadian NCAA basketball player from Duke University. Fournier will continue to serve as the brand's Activewear Ambassador for a second year following a fruitful initial partnership. This move highlights Roots' increasing dedication to supporting emerging female athletes. The company is also expanding its involvement in women’s basketball.

data.title: Six Flags Entertainment Appoints Richard Haddrill as Executive Chairman of the Board of Directors
data.description: Six Flags Entertainment has announced the appointment of Richard Haddrill as the new Executive Chairman of the Board of Directors in Charlotte, North Carolina. Haddrill will be leading the board in overseeing the operations and strategic direction of the company. This move comes as part of the company's efforts to strengthen its leadership team and drive growth. Haddrill brings with him significant experience, having previously served in executive roles at various companies. The decision reflects the company's commitment to enhancing its corporate governance and driving value for its shareholders.

data.title: Beretta Holding Sends Letter to the Ruger Board of Directors Regarding All-Cash, Premium Partial Tender Offer
data.description: Luxembourg – Beretta Holding S.A., a prominent family-owned group in the premium light firearms, optics, and ammunition sector, is the largest shareholder of Sturm, Ruger & Company, Inc. with a 9.95% stake in the company. Today, Beretta Holding communicated to the Ruger Board of Directors about a proposed partial tender offer. The offer involves seeking to acquire up to 20.05% of Ruger's outstanding common stock.

data.title: ALGO's forecast: Consolidation aims $0.10 resistance in Apr 2026. Currently trading at $0.09 with RSI 47, but bearish MACD signals warn investors.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Algorand is currently trading at $0.09 in a stable market environment, with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 47. Analysis indicates a possible increase towards the $0.10 resistance level. However, investors in ALGO are advised to be cautious due to bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD).

data.title: OpenAI’s AI tool, Sora's End, discontinued as company reevaluates finances before potential IPO.
data.description: The AI startup company has decided to discontinue its video-making tool as part of a strategy to reassess expenses in anticipation of a potential high-value initial public offering (IPO).

data.title: Volatus Aerospace Expands Global Training Network Through Strategic Partnership with University of Technology, Jamaica
data.description: Volatus Aerospace has announced its expansion of the global training network by forming a strategic partnership with the University of Technology in Jamaica. This partnership will offer diverse training opportunities in the aerospace industry, catering to a wider audience. The collaboration will provide access to specialized courses and workshops for students, professionals, and enthusiasts alike. This move is part of Volatus Aerospace's goal to reach a larger audience globally and contribute to the growth and development of the aerospace sector.

data.title: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta Platforms $9 Trillion AI Moonshot Could Unlock Massive Executive Paydays If The Bet Pays Off
data.description: Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: META) has recently unveiled a new stock option program wherein top executives stand to receive substantial payouts if the company manages to reach a market capitalization of $9 trillion by 2031. This ambitious target signals a potential 500% increase from the company's current valuation of around $1.5 trillion. The program, considered one of the most daring compensation structures in the tech industry, includes senior leaders such as CTO Andrew Bosworth, CPO Chris Cox, COO Javier Olivan, CFO Susan Li, CLO C.J. Mahoney, and Vice Chairman Dina Powell McCormick. Notably, CEO Mark Zuckerberg is excluded from this program. The details from public filings indicate that executives will only unlock the full value of these options if the company achieves the defined milestone.
Pharma Equity Group A/S releases its 2025 annual report, highlighting key financial figures.

data.title: Einride Publishes Voluntary Safety Self-Assessment for Autonomous Heavy-Duty Trucks
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in Stockholm, Einride AB, a tech company pioneering cost-effective electric and autonomous freight services for major global shippers, disclosed the release of its Voluntary Safety report. This report highlights the company's commitment to safety in its operations.

data.title: INJ price aims for $3.28 resistance by April 2026, showing neutral momentum at $3.11 with a 49.78 RSI. Technical analysis hints at a potential move, while bearish MACD signals caution.
data.description: The price of INJ is currently at $3.11 with a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 49.78, indicating neutral momentum. Technical analysis hints at a possible increase to $3.28, which is the Bollinger Band resistance. However, the bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) signals advise caution when predicting the price of Injective.

data.title: Kingsoft Cloud Announces Unaudited Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Kingsoft Cloud Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: KC, HKEX: 3896), a prominent cloud service provider in China, disclosed its unaudited financial performance for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year concluding on December 31.

data.title: Identity and Biometric Authentication Cybersecurity Provider BIO-key to Host Year-End Investor Call Tuesday, March 31st at 10am ET
data.description: BKYI, a company specializing in identity and biometric authentication cybersecurity, will be hosting its year-end investor call on Tuesday, March 31st at 10am Eastern Time. Investors can participate by dialing 1-877-418-5460.

data.title: Bitcoin Holds $71,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Test Breakout Levels
data.description: Bitcoin remains steady around $71,000 amid positive market sentiment in the cryptocurrency space. Bitcoin ETFs experienced a net outflow of $66.7 million on Tuesday, while Ethereum ETFs saw $40.8 million in net outflows. The current prices of major cryptocurrencies are: Bitcoin at $71,846, Ethereum at $2,195.01, Solana at $92.56, XRP at $1.42, Dogecoin at $0.09687, and Shiba Inu at $0.056186. Additionally, Meme coin market capitalization saw a 1.3% increase in the last 24 hours. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
